fields.summary: Specifies a replacement color for a single entry in a font's color palette.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` pairs a palette color index with an ARGB replacement
color. A span of these overrides can be supplied via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides> when cloning a typeface to
change specific colors in the active CPAL palette without switching to a
different palette entirely.

The <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color> field stores a packed ARGB
value in the same format as <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor> (`0xAARRGGBB`).

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new() { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
    new() { Index = 1, Color = (uint)SKColors.Blue },
};

var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    PaletteIndex = 0,
    PaletteOverrides = overrides,
};

using var customTypeface = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement color as a packed ARGB value.
fields.value: The ARGB color packed as <c>0xAARRGGBB</c>, matching the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> layout.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The value to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both the index and color are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current instance.
fields.returns: A hash code based on the palette index and color value.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette color entry to override.
fields.value: The zero-based index into the active color palette.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instances are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instances are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
